title: Piquant Fluffy Filipino Vegetable Menudo
description: A spicy and fluffy Filipino dish featuring clotted cream and a variety of vegetables, perfect for a hangover cure. This vegetarian-friendly menudo is a twist on the traditional Filipino recipe.
instructions: Heat the clotted cream in a large saucepan over medium heat until it starts to melt and bubble.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the diced tomato, sliced bell pepper, and grated carrot, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the vegetable broth, soy sauce, and sriracha sauce, and stir to combine.
Add the diced potato and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the potato is tender.
Season the menudo with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
Garnish with chopped green onions and a dollop of clotted cream, if desired.
